docket_entries.description: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-10-633653 WITH CASE CGC-10-502596, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF UGBAJA, CHIKA HEARING SET FOR SEP-13-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO CONCOLIDATE ACTIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC (NAMED AS GMAC MTG LLC)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CHIKA UGBAJA'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-10-633653 WITH CASE CGC-10-502596 IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF MAY SEEK AN INJUNCTION TO STAY THE EVICTION PROCEEDINGS UNTIL TRIAL OF DEFENDANT'S WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE SALE ACTION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 526. SEE ASUNCION V. THE SUPERIOR COURT OF SAN DIEGO COUNTY (1990) 108 CAL APP 3D 141, 146. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS GREENPOINT MORTGAGE FUNDING, INC, GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustain without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Candace Yount, CSR #2737

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-10-633653 WITH CASE CGC-10-502596
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CHIKA UGBAJA'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-10-633653 WITH CASE CGC-10-502596 is denied. Plaintiff may seek an injunction to stay the eviction proceedings until trial of defendant's wrongful foreclosure sale action pursuant to C.C.P. section 526. See Asuncion v. The Superior Court of San Diego County (1990) 108 Cal App 3d 141, 146. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
